persona_set_note: md5 + lastUpdated of the canonical 22-…/persona-categories.json this asset was built against. The N38 count-triad assertion (qc-assert-repo-consistency.py:_persona_set_triad_failures) and persona-set-asset-consistency-guard.yml fail CI if blueprint dirs != categories keys != persona_count != canonical_persona_count. Rebuild incrementally via shared-utils/prebuilt-index/build-and-publish.sh (HASH-SKIP embeds only the delta) — NEVER a full re-embed.
section_tag_note: embeddings table carries section_number + mode columns. coaching rows at section_number=3, leadership/governance rows at section_number=4. mode values: {both, coaching, leadership}. Section-tagged rows allow mode-aware retrieval without a full re-index.

pr363_personas.note: All 10 PR-363 canonical personas are present in this v2.1.0 asset under their canonical slugs, section-tagged. The stale prebuilt-index-v2.0.0 predated these blueprints; v2.1.0 resolves the gap.

orphan_blueprints_shipped.note: All 3 orphan-blueprint personas are present in this v2.1.0 asset under their canonical slugs, section-tagged. They are fully operational for both Coaching Mode and Task/Agent-Governance mode.

notes: Canonical 54-persona section-tagged rebuild with GA gemini-embedding-2 @3072. 54 personas / 4413 chunks / 68 source files. All canonical slugs ship section-tagged: coaching rows at section_number=3, leadership/governance rows at section_number=4. Replaces prebuilt-index-v2.0.0 (48 personas, 7615 chunks, no section tags). Clients download this asset instead of re-embedding per box (saves Gemini API credits). Every vector is float32 @ dim 3072. SHA256 verified at build time and must be verified before install. ROHDE NOTE (open): rohde-the-sketchnote-workbook has a selector category-map gap (_CATEGORY_DOMAINS['design'] does not include visual-storytelling); fix deferred pending per-box index validation.
